title: Liability of secretary
doc_html:
§299.10.  Liability of secretary

The secretary or any of his representatives shall not be liable to any person because of a refund that has been remitted to a claiming agency in accordance with the provisions of this Part.  

Acts 1983, No. 288, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
